description: MCP server for Open-Xchange: email (IMAP/SMTP), Sieve filters, CalDAV calendar, CardDAV contacts
name: io.github.Rheopyrin/ox-mcp

environmentVariables.description: IMAP/SMTP/ManageSieve host for the mail section (email_* tools).
environmentVariables.name: OX_MCP_MAIL_SERVER

environmentVariables.description: Login user (mailbox address) for the mail section.
environmentVariables.name: OX_MCP_MAIL_USER

environmentVariables.description: App password for the mail section (basic auth).
environmentVariables.name: OX_MCP_MAIL_APP_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: CalDAV host for the calDav section (calendar_* tools).
environmentVariables.name: OX_MCP_CALDAV_SERVER

environmentVariables.description: Login user for the calDav section.
environmentVariables.name: OX_MCP_CALDAV_USER

environmentVariables.description: App password for the calDav section (servers may scope passwords per protocol).
environmentVariables.name: OX_MCP_CALDAV_APP_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: CardDAV host for the cardDav section (contact_* tools).
environmentVariables.name: OX_MCP_CARDDAV_SERVER

environmentVariables.description: Login user for the cardDav section.
environmentVariables.name: OX_MCP_CARDDAV_USER

environmentVariables.description: App password for the cardDav section.
environmentVariables.name: OX_MCP_CARDDAV_APP_PASSWORD

title: ox-mcp
